repositories.name: Cast Metadata & TV Controls
repositories.description: Unifies Google Cast, Android/Google TV, ADB, manufacturer media players, inputs, apps, metadata, persistent physical identities, capability routing, health diagnostics, and Repairs into one controller per physical device.

repositories.name: Unified TV Card
repositories.description: Responsive Home Assistant TV controller card with dynamic app and input dropdowns, mute beside volume, playback, relative seeking, Android TV remote controls, artwork, quick apps, and diagnostics.
